name: Wild Mushroom/Olive/Sun-Dried Tomato Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Pk enoki mushrooms, stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 550°F.
2. Spread half a cup of tomato sauce on each shell (or one-fourth cup on the 8-inch shells).
3. Place olive halves, sun-dried tomatoes, peppers, and small clumps of mushrooms on the pizza.
4. Sprinkle provolone cheese over the vegetables.
5. Distribute mozzarella cheese evenly over the entire pizza.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes until the dough is browned and crisp, and the cheese is golden and bubbly.
